title: Slovakian-Italian Takrai Chicken Bowl
description: A fusion of Slovakian and Italian flavors with the exotic taste of takrai. A perfect dish for adventurous foodies. Pair it with a glass of white wine for a delightful evening.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the mixture all over the chicken, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the chicken in a large bowl and bake for 25-30 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped lemongrass and cook for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Add the chopped takrai and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until softened.
Stir in chopped parsley and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the sliced chicken in the large bowl with the lemongrass-takrai mixture spooned over the top.
